description: A specific customer requires all their outbound cartons to have a special 'Fragile' label and a customer-specific barcode label applied before shipping.

nodes.task_description: When an order for this customer is being packed, the system flags it for required Value-Added Services (VAS).

expected_outcome.value: The packer is alerted that special labeling is required for this order.
Agent successfully prints the required custom label.

nodes.task_description: Apply both the 'Fragile' sticker and the custom barcode label to the carton and confirm the VAS task is complete.

expected_outcome.value: Agent applies the labels and confirms completion in the system.
